title: Tangent
description: Schema defining the structure of a tangent artifact within the Agent OS. Tangents represent deferred implementation tasks with dependencies, trigger conditions, and governance references.

id.description: Unique identifier for this tangent (e.g., history-query-layer-001).

description.description: Detailed explanation of what this tangent represents and why it was deferred.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the tangent.

reason.description: Explanation for why this tangent was deferred or what conditions must be met.

dependencies.description: List of tangent IDs, system names, or artifact IDs that must be completed first.

governance_reference.description: List of constitution file paths that this tangent relates to.

expected_benefits.description: List of benefits or outcomes expected when this tangent is implemented.

trigger_conditions.description: Conditions that must be met before this tangent can be activated.

related_governance.description: Additional governance files that relate to this tangent.

related_tangents.description: Other tangent IDs that are related or complementary.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this tangent was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this tangent was last modified.
